ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: This plugin shouldn't scroll if you used a link to the note header like [link](note.md#header). If it did, then increase the delay until everything works. If you are not using links to page sections, set the delay to zero (slider to the left). Slider values: 0-300 ms (default value: 100 ms).
ast.target: 如果您使用了指向笔记标题的链接（如 [link](note.md#header)），此插件不应滚动。如果发生了滚动，请增加延迟直到一切正常。如果您不使用指向页面部分的链接，请将延迟设置为零（滑块移至最左侧）。滑块值：0-300 毫秒（默认值：100 毫秒）。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Useful for multi-device users. If you don't want to wait until closing Obsidian to the cursor position been saved.
ast.target: 适用于多设备用户。如果您不想等到关闭 Obsidian 才保存光标位置。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: On startup, remove saved positions for files that have not been visited within the selected period.
ast.target: 启动时，移除在选定时间段内未访问过的文件的已保存位置。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: On startup, if the number of saved positions exceeds this limit, the oldest entries are removed. Most-recently visited files are kept.
ast.target: 启动时，如果已保存位置的数量超过此限制，将移除最旧的条目。最近访问的文件将被保留。

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Delay after opening a new note

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Delay between saving the cursor position to file
ast.target: 将光标位置保存到文件之间的延迟

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Remove entries for deleted or missing files
ast.target: 移除已删除或缺失文件的条目

ast.name: setName
ast.target: 移除早于以下时间的条目

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Maximum number of entries to keep

ast.name: text
ast.target: 记住光标位置 - 设置
